title: donut-crm-pipeline-data-contract
description: Foundational OpenSpec change at openspec/changes/donut-crm-pipeline-data-contract/ — shared store contract (ProductRecord, QuarterRef, cross-tool ref shapes, createToolStore factory) all 8 pipeline tools build on. Must implement first; nothing else can start.
close_reason: Implementation already complete: pipeline-store.ts (329 lines) with all contract types, product store, quarter helpers, tool store factory. ost-store.ts already migrated onto factory (D9). pnpm check passes with 0 errors.

title: Cadence & Reflection Kit tool (stage 05)
description: Implement OpenSpec change cadence-reflection-kit-tool: store, page, island (mode picker, metrics, retro log, demo checklist) per design D1-D7.
close_reason: Cadence & Reflection Kit shipped: store + page + island, check/build green, QA verified

title: Implement Stakeholder Update Composer tool
description: Founder-ring pipeline tool: page + island + update-store/update-sources. OpenSpec change stakeholder-update-composer-tool.

title: pipeline-tools-chrome: shared stage nav + product switcher
description: The eight Donut CRM pipeline tools each resolve resolveActiveProduct() silently and have no shared chrome. Build the shared stage nav (Discovery -> Definition -> Delivery ...) and a product switcher UI so a visitor can move between tools and products without going back to the URL bar. Deferred out of donut-crm-spec-builder (openspec/changes/donut-crm-spec-builder/design.md D6, Non-Goals); contract Open Question in openspec/changes/archive/2026-07-23-donut-crm-pipeline-data-contract/design.md.

title: Course: Testing Donut CRM for the AI Era
description: QA ring companion capstone, same case/timeline as the PO course. Blocked by Test Register, Spec Builder, Vertical Slicer, Cadence & Reflection Kit.

title: Course: Two Quarters at Donut CRM
description: Capstone, PO/PM ring. 12 chapters spanning all 6 pipeline stages. Blocked by all 8 tools since each chapter embeds one.

title: Article: When a deal wants to jump the backlog — use the matrix, not politics
description: Sales cross-cut. Walks through Backlog Prioritizer's kill/probe queue.

title: Article: Where quality lives in Scrum vs. Kanban vs. Scrumban
description: QA ring, ties into the Stage 05 first-principles reframe. Needs both Cadence Kit and Test Register.

title: Article: From acceptance criteria to Playwright spec — closing the Definition-to-test gap
description: QA ring. Walks through Test Register consuming Spec Builder's AC and Vertical Slicer's stories.

title: Article: Demo day as the OKR checkpoint, not a show-and-tell
description: Stage 05. Walks through Cadence & Reflection Kit's demo checklist tied to an OKR key result.

title: Article: Choosing a cadence for Donut CRM — why scrumban fits a CRM with both roadmap work and reactive support tickets
description: Stage 05. Walks through Cadence & Reflection Kit's mode choice.

title: Article: First principles of the delivery layer — what sprints, kanban, and scrumban are each solving for
description: Stage 05 anchor. Best written with Cadence & Reflection Kit's mode picker as the concrete artifact.

title: Article: Prioritizing against the OKR, not against the loudest stakeholder
description: Stage 04. Walks through Backlog Prioritizer plotting against an active OKR.

title: Article: Reading your PM's OKR update — what to ask, what to leave alone
description: Founder ring. Walks through Stakeholder Update Composer's output.

title: Article: Test registers for the AI era — what to track when AI writes (and rewrites) your Playwright specs
description: QA ring flagship article. Walks through Test Register's staleness/drift behavior.

title: Article: Adoption isn't a launch-week metric, it's a season
description: Stage 06. Walks through OKR Check-In's multi-snapshot trend view.

title: Article: Closing the loop — did the key result actually move?
description: Stage 06. Walks through OKR Check-In's quarter-close ritual.

title: Article: Retros that produce one action, not eleven
description: Stage 05. Walks through Cadence & Reflection Kit's one-action retro log.

title: Article: Vertical slicing — turning one big feature into ten shippable ones
description: Stage 03. Walks through Vertical Slicer's pattern-assignment interaction.

title: Article: PRD, pitch, or story map — naming the job before naming the artifact
description: Stage 03. Walks through Spec Builder's three-format picker directly.

title: Article: Who Does What By How Much — the bridge from OKRs to the Opportunity Solution Tree
description: Stage 01. References OKR Organizer tool as the practical artifact.

title: stakeholder-update-sources-v2: include Backlog Prioritizer + Test Register sources
description: Deferred from stakeholder-update-composer-tool task 5.3: extend update-sources.ts coverage to backlog/test-register data; also reconcile structural cadence/checkin types against merged cadence-store.ts/checkin-store.ts field names.

title: Nav/chrome link for /tools/okr-check-in/ (pipeline-tools-chrome)
description: Deferred from okr-check-in-tool task 5.5: the tool now has a footer link (added at integration) but no pipeline-tools-chrome nav participation. Cite okr-check-in-tool change + donut-crm-pipeline-data-contract.

title: Contract D4: add bklg id-prefix row for Backlog Prioritizer
description: Backlog Prioritizer ships records under storageKey pm-backlog-v1 / idPrefix bklg, but the pipeline-data-contract D4 prefix table (now archived: openspec/changes/archive/2026-07-23-donut-crm-pipeline-data-contract) has no bklg row. Add it so the contract stays the source of truth. Flagged from backlog-prioritizer-tool design.md Open Questions / task 5.5.

title: Test Register: stale-fraction display question (3/5 (+2 stale)?)
description: Open question from design.md Open Questions for donut-crm-test-register: should stale-only coverage display as e.g. '3/5 (+2 stale)' in the Coverage panel, rather than counting stale-covered items purely as gaps? Decide and, if adopted, update CoveragePanel. Records: openspec change donut-crm-test-register and the archived donut-crm-pipeline-data-contract.

title: pipeline-tools-chrome: include Test Register page in nav/footer chrome
description: The Test Register page (/tools/test-register/) deferred all nav/footer chrome changes to the pipeline-tools-chrome change (per tasks.md 3.3). Ensure this page participates when that chrome work lands. Records: openspec change donut-crm-test-register and the archived donut-crm-pipeline-data-contract.

title: Cross-tool Donut CRM sample scenarios for Test Register
description: Seed the Test Register (donut-crm-test-register) with realistic sample test scenarios linked to the shared Donut CRM sample product, so the tool boots with illustrative data like its siblings. Blocked on sibling sample-data decisions (Spec Builder / Vertical Slicer sample content). Records: openspec change donut-crm-test-register and the archived donut-crm-pipeline-data-contract.

title: Vertical Slicer: swap listSpecsForProduct raw-key reader for a direct spec-store import
description: slicer-store.listSpecsForProduct reads the raw pm-spec-v1 localStorage key defensively (design D2) because Spec Builder was a sibling lane in flight. Spec Builder has now landed with a firm SpecRecord.title export, so this can become a direct import from ~/utils/spec-store with zero behaviour change.

title: Link Vertical Slicer (and sibling pipeline tools) from SiteFooter free-tools list
description: SiteFooter.astro lists 7 free tools but not /tools/vertical-slicer/ (nor spec-builder / backlog-prioritizer). Each parallel lane deliberately skipped this edit because four lanes touching the same footer list guarantees a merge conflict. Orchestrator should add all new tool links once after merging the lanes.

title: Move prevQuarter into pipeline-store (shared contract)
description: okr-organizer-tool design.md D5 open question, raised at implementation time. src/utils/okr-store.ts exports a local prevQuarter() as the inverse of the contract's nextQuarter(). Any other quarter-scoped tool (OKR Check-In, Cadence Kit) will want the same. Decide whether pipeline-data-contract should absorb it as a delta; if so, okr-store re-exports or drops its local copy.

title: OKR Organizer: decide whether the seeded SAMPLE_OKR ships
description: okr-organizer-tool design.md Open Questions leaves this open. src/utils/okr-store.ts currently seeds one Donut CRM example OKR on a genuinely first run (guarded on the pm-okr-v1 key being absent, so a visitor who deletes it never gets it back). Decide keep/drop; dropping is deleting the SAMPLE_OKR constant and the seedSample migrate hook.

title: Optional: embed Spec Builder in the CDH course as an exercise
description: Open Question from openspec/changes/donut-crm-spec-builder/design.md: the OST builder is embedded in the Continuous Discovery course via source: course; Spec Builder is standalone-only in v1 because the store factory's active pointer is product-scoped, not course-context-scoped. Decide whether to model course contexts for the pipeline tools (would touch createToolStore scoping in src/utils/pipeline-store.ts — contract change). Contract: openspec/changes/archive/2026-07-23-donut-crm-pipeline-data-contract/design.md.

title: Optional: ship a pre-filled Donut CRM sample spec
description: Open Question from openspec/changes/donut-crm-spec-builder/design.md: should the seeded 'Donut CRM' sample product ship with one pre-filled sample spec? Leaning no for v1 — the OST pick flow is the point of the tool and a canned spec bypasses it. Revisit when the running-case demo content lands. Contract: openspec/changes/archive/2026-07-23-donut-crm-pipeline-data-contract/design.md.

title: Agreement-Certainty Matrix: reword internally-inconsistent 2x2-orientation spec scenario (annotated in archived spec delta); consider ScrollReveal-equivalent for React islands
Vertical Slicer StoryRef join with story-map records (story-map design.md Open Questions, deferred)
Metric tree polish: rename MetricHelpModal→MetricTreeHelpModal with per-concept sections (task 3.3); fix Escape double-close over fullscreen; shared diagram auto-fit in narrow post columns
RAID-log tracking tool (deliberately not built by decision-door-classifier — design D1)
Pipeline data export/import (JSON download of one product's pipeline)
description: Deferred Open Question from openspec/changes/donut-crm-pipeline-data-contract/design.md: export/import a whole product's pipeline data as JSON, useful for the Donut CRM running-case demo. Explicitly a non-goal of the contract change; needs its own proposal.
acceptance_criteria: Own OpenSpec change; round-trips every pm-*-v1 store plus ost-trees-v1 for one productId; import is additive and never clobbers unrelated products.

title: pipeline-tools-chrome: shared stage nav + product switcher for the Donut CRM pipeline tools
description: Deferred Open Question from openspec/changes/donut-crm-pipeline-data-contract/design.md: the eight pipeline tool pages likely want shared chrome (stage nav, product switcher island). UI only — the data contract already provides listProducts/resolveActiveProduct/setActiveProductId. Pick this up from the first tool proposal that needs it.
acceptance_criteria: Own OpenSpec change; shared chrome component(s) under src/components/tools/; uses the pipeline-store product APIs, no parallel product state.

title: Article: What a PO absorbs vs. hands off, by team size — and the hat nobody actually wears
description: Derived from the multiple-hats-by-team-size matrix; QA-orphaning-at-8-people is the hook. No tool dependency.
close_reason: Article written and saved. pnpm check passes with 0 errors.

title: Article: Mining support tickets into the Opportunity Solution Tree, not just a bug queue
description: Support cross-cut. No tool dependency (OST tool already built).
close_reason: Article written and saved. pnpm check passes with 0 errors.

title: Article: Where discovery interviews and marketing research are the same conversation
description: Marketing cross-cut. No tool dependency.
close_reason: Article written and saved. pnpm check passes with 0 errors.

title: Article: When you need a dedicated BA, and when the PO already does this job
description: BA cross-cut. No tool dependency.
close_reason: Article written and saved. pnpm check passes with 0 errors.

title: Article: When to sit in on discovery, not just the demo
description: Founder ring. No tool dependency (OST tool already exists/built).
close_reason: Article written and saved. pnpm check passes with 0 errors.

title: Article: Cascading OKRs to department and product without a status report
description: Stage 01. No tool dependency.
close_reason: Article written and saved. pnpm check passes with 0 errors.

title: Article: Before you write an OKR — OKRs vs. Rocks vs. a bare North Star
description: Stage 01 first-principles reframe. No tool dependency — conceptual.
close_reason: Article written and saved. pnpm check passes with 0 errors.

title: Relabel existing Donut CRM-lineage posts to consistent naming
description: Body-text relabel to Donut CRM (locked URLs stay as-is) for: 2025-08-25 commands-that-write-prds post, 2025-02-06 user-story-mapping post, 2021-05-21 agreement-certainty-matrix post, 2025-04-10 backlog-cleanup post. No tool dependency.
close_reason: Relabeled recap_crm to Donut CRM in body text of 2021-05-21 post (the only one of the 4 that contained a product name). The other 3 posts (2025-08-25, 2025-02-06, 2025-04-10) are generic PM content with no product name references to relabel.

title: Contract: add BacklogItemRef { backlogId, itemId } if a consumer appears
description: design.md D7: no tool references Backlog Prioritizer items by id today (Stakeholder Update reads whole boards via listForProduct). If a future tool needs to cite a specific prioritization decision (e.g. 'story X killed in 2026-Q3'), add BacklogItemRef to the pipeline contract and promote the item id prefix to contract-level. YAGNI until a consumer exists. Follow-up from backlog-prioritizer-tool task 5.5.

title: Backlog Prioritizer: manual rank override (only if usage demands)
description: design.md Non-Goals defers drag-to-reorder / manual rank override of the priority list; ordering is computed by rankItems. Revisit only if real usage demands a manual override. Follow-up from backlog-prioritizer-tool task 5.5.

title: Vertical Slicer: decide on a pre-filled sample slicing session for Donut CRM
description: Contract open question, per-tool call. v1 ships no seeded session - the three pattern cards carry the Donut CRM running example inline. Revisit if first-visit users stall on the empty state.

title: Vertical Slicer: optional course-embed source prop
description: Open question from design.md: should the Slicer island accept a source prop for course-chapter embeds like TreeBuilder does? Deferred at v1 - no course chapter teaches slicing yet and SliceSession carries no source context. Additive when a chapter needs it.
